_comment: SUPERVISED-WRITE PERMISSION PROFILE - reference only. This file is NOT auto-loaded by Claude Code. Only settings.local.json is auto-loaded. This file documents elevated permissions available for supervised sessions.
_usage: Copy specific entries from allow_when_supervised into the 'allow' array in settings.local.json when a supervised write session begins. Remove them when done. Never leave broad patterns active unattended.
_do_not_auto_load: true — Claude Code auto-loads settings.local.json only. This file has no effect unless entries are manually copied from it.
_risk: Each entry here expands Claude's mutation surface. Treat as operator elevation, not defaults.

allow_when_supervised.when: branch switching during supervised implementation session
supervised commit session - operator reviews commit message before allowing
supervised push to feature branch only - never to master directly
diagnostic session requiring arbitrary curl targets
allow_when_supervised.remove_after: session end - default settings.local.json has specific localhost curl entries

allow_when_supervised.when: supervised PowerShell diagnostic - prefer specific named script entries
operator-supervised agent dispatch only - verify slot worktree is clean first
starting MCP server locally - operator confirms port 8787 is available
